title: Phase Contract
description: Operational contract for a lifecycle phase or subfase, capturing entry/exit criteria, artefacts, assumptions, clarifications, and sign-off authority.

id.description: Unique identifier for this phase contract (e.g. PC-1.1-001)

status.description: Current status of the phase contract

owner.description: Person or role responsible for fulfilling this contract

gate.description: Gate identifier that closes this phase or subfase (e.g. A, B, C)

entry_criteria.description: Conditions that must be true before this phase/subfase can start

exit_criteria.description: Conditions that must be true before this phase/subfase is considered complete

artefacts_required.description: Artefacts that must exist at the start of or during this phase

artefacts_produced.description: Artefacts that must be produced as outputs of this phase

assumptions.description: Assumptions that underpin this phase contract

clarifications.description: Open decisions or clarifications needed for this phase

sign_off_authority.description: Role or person with authority to formally sign off this phase contract

notes.description: Additional notes or context for this phase contract
